defects.desc: boundary bug: should be >= ; an order exactly at a tier threshold (100/250/500) misses its discount
empty cart -> ZeroDivisionError; no len==0 guard
operation order: tax applied before discount, so discount is taken on the taxed amount -> wrong final total
mutable default argument; accumulates across calls
non-constant-time signature comparison -> timing attack; should use hmac.compare_digest
privilege escalation: trusts caller-supplied claimed_role over the verified token role

defects.construct: can_delete: re-reads SESSIONS after the role check
defects.desc: TOCTOU: permission checked, then session re-read from mutable store before acting; role could be revoked/changed in between
spec/impl drift: docstring says returns new expiry timestamp; code returns session_id instead
fail-open auth bypass: any exception during verification returns authenticated=True

scoring: weighted recall = sum(weight * caught) / sum(weight); caught in {yes:1, partial:0.5, no:0}
